name: llm-tools-nmap
title: llm-tools-nmap
summary: plugin for LLM tool hat provides Nmap network scanning capabilities
description:
plugin for LLM tool hat provides Nmap network scanning capabilities
This package contains a plugin for Simon Willison's LLM tool that provides
Nmap network scanning capabilities through function calling. This plugin
enables LLMs to perform network discovery and security scanning tasks using
the powerful Nmap tool.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use llm-tools-nmap because plugin for LLM tool hat provides Nmap network scanning capabilities.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use llm-tools-nmap as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair llm-tools-nmap with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `llm-tools-nmap --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
